question: Create (3,4) tensor, unsqueeze at dim 0, then permute to (4,3). Print shapes.
expected_output:
Original: torch.Size([3, 4])
Unsqueezed: torch.Size([1, 3, 4])
Permuted: torch.Size([4, 3])
template:

t = torch.randn(3, 4)
print(f"Original: {t.shape}")

u = t.???(???)
print(f"Unsqueezed: {u.shape}")

p = t.???(???, ???)
print(f"Permuted: {p.shape}")
